title: Claude Fable 5 is Now BANNED?!
summary: Cole Medin reviews Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 model, which was reportedly pulled from availability by US government export-control directive allegedly over jailbreak concerns. He compares its performance and pricing to Claude Opus 4.8 and discusses implications for developers building on these models.
writeup: Cole Medin reviews Anthropic's Claude Fable 5, a model reportedly pulled from availability by a US government export-control directive allegedly tied to jailbreak concerns. The review compares Fable 5's performance and pricing against Claude Opus 4.8. The video covers what the export-control action means for developers building on these models, framing the central concepts of model capability, jailbreak risk, and regulatory restriction.
